## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? (e.g. "I want to export diagrams as PNG without opening a browser")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you've tried or alternative approaches.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links to similar plugins, etc.
